name: volmarket-api
description: Root package for Vercel serverless functions in /api (the static frontend builds from frontend-react/ — see vercel.json).
comment: type:module is REQUIRED: @solana/web3.js pulls rpc-websockets -> uuid@14 (ESM-only). As a CommonJS function, Vercel crashes at import with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM (require() of ESM uuid). Building the function as ESM loads the whole chain via import(), which is fine. Do not remove type:module without re-testing /api/fund on a deploy.
